title: Small Blocks
description: Reduces block size in hand so they don’t cover your screen during gameplay.
body:
Small Blocks is a lightweight resource pack that makes held blocks appear smaller in your hand.
This helps keep your screen clear during PvP, building, and fast movement situations.

The pack improves visibility without changing the vanilla style, making it perfect for competitive and survival players who want a cleaner view.

⚡ Features

- Smaller held block model

- Clearer screen while placing blocks

- Better PvP visibility

- Vanilla-friendly design

- Lightweight & performance safe

🎮 Perfect For

- PvP players

- Bridging & clutch plays

- Fast builders

- Players who prefer minimal screen coverage
